name: Douglas Emmett Inc
summary: Douglas Emmett, Inc. is a fully integrated, self-administered and self-managed REIT focused on owning, acquiring, developing and managing office and multifamily properties in highly walkable submarkets of Los Angeles and Honolulu, Hawaii. The company operates a consolidated portfolio of office and residential properties, manages unconsolidated institutional real estate funds, and conducts development activities including conversion of office properties and construction of apartment communities.
